title: Design an urban permaculture system
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design an urban permaculture system demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop a design brief for an urban permaculture system

pcs.text: Consult with client and determine design objectives for an urban permaculture system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client and determine design objectives for an urban permaculture system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client and determine design objectives for an urban permaculture system.

pcs.text: Determine design context
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine design context?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine design context.

pcs.text: Develop and confirm design brief with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and confirm design brief with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and confirm design brief with client.

pcs.text: Negotiate and confirm budget and timelines for design development
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Negotiate and confirm budget and timelines for design development?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Negotiate and confirm budget and timelines for design development.

elements.title: Undertake design analysis

pcs.text: Access maps, images and geospatial data for site

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access maps, images and geospatial data for site.

pcs.text: Survey site for Zones 1 and 2 and confirm or supplement information of maps and images
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Survey site for Zones 1 and 2 and confirm or supplement information of maps and images?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Survey site for Zones 1 and 2 and confirm or supplement information of maps and images.

pcs.text: Prepare a site base plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a site base plan.

pcs.text: Record site survey data on site plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record site survey data on site plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record site survey data on site plan.

pcs.text: Conduct a neighbourhood and bioregional analysis for site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a neighbourhood and bioregional analysis for site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a neighbourhood and bioregional analysis for site.

pcs.text: Identify potential permaculture design elements suitable for design brief outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential permaculture design elements suitable for design brief outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential permaculture design elements suitable for design brief outcomes.

pcs.text: Assess and select permaculture design elements according to design brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and select permaculture design elements according to design brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and select permaculture design elements according to design brief.

pcs.text: Revise and confirm design elements with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Revise and confirm design elements with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Revise and confirm design elements with client.

elements.title: Prepare a design concept

pcs.text: Determine and evaluate a concept for an urban permaculture system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and evaluate a concept for an urban permaculture system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and evaluate a concept for an urban permaculture system.

pcs.text: Prepare concept design drawings
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare concept design drawings?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare concept design drawings.

pcs.text: Identify and document plant and livestock suitable for concept design in an urban setting

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document plant and livestock suitable for concept design in an urban setting.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and compile a bill of materials and cost estimates for design elements, plants and livestock.

pcs.text: Prepare a preliminary budget for design concept

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare a preliminary budget for design concept.

pcs.text: Present the concept plan and budget to client for feedback and approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present the concept plan and budget to client for feedback and approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present the concept plan and budget to client for feedback and approval.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review concept plan and budget according to client feedback.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Design an urban permaculture system according to design brief and approved concept plan and budget.

pcs.text: Present design plans, drawings and specifications to client for final feedback and approval

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present design plans, drawings and specifications to client for final feedback and approval.

pcs.text: Undertake final revision changes for design according to client feedback and approvals

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Finalise and record design according to workplace procedures.
